---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an idea or improvement for CSMS
title: "[FEATURE]"
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''

---

---

**What problem does this solve?**
A clear and concise description of what the problem or limitation is. 
e.g. "As a world maker, I can't currently..."

**Describe the feature you'd like**
A clear and concise description of what you want to happen.

**Which system would this affect?**
- [ ] Character Sheets
- [ ] Combat / Dice Rolling
- [ ] Ordinance System
- [ ] Inventory System (`iv_`)
- [ ] Config Card
- [ ] Multiplayer
- [ ] New system entirely
- [ ] Other: ___

**Who benefits from this?**
- [ ] Players
- [ ] World Makers
- [ ] Both

**Have you tried a workaround?**
If yes, describe what you currently do instead.

**Additional context**
Any other context, references, or examples that might help explain the idea. Screenshots welcome.
